# Brandon Patterson — ark31.info

> Platform Engineer / SRE in Charlotte, NC. 6+ years building and operating
> Kubernetes infrastructure on GCP and AWS — GitOps, Terraform, and observability
> at scale. Currently at Jasper AI; previously Mozilla. Open to senior
> Platform/SRE roles and select consulting engagements.

## Facts

- Name: Brandon Patterson
- Title: Platform Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
- Location: Charlotte, NC (works remotely)
- Current employer: Jasper AI
- Previous: Mozilla (SRE, 2023–2025; Software Engineer, 2021–2023)
- Education: B.S., Virginia Commonwealth University
- Contact: bpatterson@ark31.info

## Expertise

Kubernetes (GKE, K3s), Terraform, ArgoCD/GitOps, Atlantis, Datadog, Prometheus,
Grafana, Loki, observability and SLOs, incident response, CI/CD (GitHub Actions,
CircleCI, Jenkins), FinOps, GCP, AWS, Go, Python.

## Selected impact

- Operated multi-tenant Kubernetes clusters supporting 50M+ users at Mozilla.
- Migrated production workloads AWS → GCP with Terraform, cutting cloud spend ~40%.
- ArgoCD subject-matter expert at Jasper AI; fixed the DORA metrics pipeline and
  improved GitOps delivery reliability.
- Runs a multi-node Proxmox + K3s homelab with full GitOps and observability
  (19 ArgoCD-managed applications across 8 nodes).
